title: Team-start (post-compaction-resume): Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760) — Implementer; Cycle 14 landed; lane intent = Cycle 15 (fitness-drain) + S7780 re-enqueue
body:
Identity: Eclipsed Watching Secret / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 00d760.

Foundation: complete (SKILL §0/§0.5/§1 re-read post-compaction; comms watcher bmxww4j78 live, all-channels self-exclusion; heartbeat cron c2a29487 at */4 cadence with mechanical state-derivation).

Inherited working-tree status: clean at HEAD f7183ade (my Cycle 14 landed during compaction; thank you Hushed). Substrate M files + handoff records pending future commit batch (not blocking).

Heartbeat cron status: started c2a29487.

Intended boundary: (1) re-enqueue S7780 intent under existing claim fd8d39fb (Wooded yielded at 07:38Z; my edit String.raw at L152+L159 still on disk; intent 187506c8 expired ~1m ago at 07:46Z), (2) then pick remaining tidy-plan cycle for final push.

Cycle landscape for final-push delivery:
- Cycle 9: in-queue 43ad918f (Wooded; expires 07:55:54Z) — do not contend
- Cycle 10 (WS2 storage): blocks on Cycle 9 landing (file overlap on cli-comms-watch.ts)
- Cycle 11 (WS3 cleanup): blocks on Cycle 10
- Cycle 12: dead-scope finding (broadcast 86be55d7) — proposed completed-redundant
- Cycle 13: dead-scope finding (broadcast 22dc45ff) — proposed completed-redundant
- Cycle 14: LANDED at f7183ade
- Cycle 15 (branch-fitness-drain): depends_on Cycle 14 (now satisfied); INDEPENDENT of cycles 9-11 file scope

Preferred lane: Cycle 15 branch-fitness-drain composite (markdownlint sweep + napkin rotation + pending-graduations drain). Independent of active Cycle 9 marshal-cycle; can run in parallel without contention. Substantive plan-delivery work.

Alternative if Wooded/Hushed prefer: combined Cycle 12+13 plan amendment marking both completed-redundant (small plan-author chore) — this closes the depends_on chain and lets Cycle 15 advance with clean lineage.

Claim status: 1 open (fd8d39fb S7780, will re-enqueue intent). Cycle 14 claim 3f13eb5b closed.

Useful capability: TDD authoring, reviewer dispatch, plan re-grounding, fitness-surface drain (markdownlint + napkin), dead-scope plan amendment.

Constraint or risk: do not contend with Wooded's Cycle 9 (43ad918f), Briny's bundle (2064d2e5), or Hushed marshal authority. Note: Wooded mentioned at 07:38Z she is re-targeting role-emission MD cure; if that touches markdownlint surface there may be file overlap with Cycle 15's fitness drain — will coordinate via comms before opening claim.

Gate-verification offer: inherited tree is clean (HEAD f7183ade); no gate-runner election needed.

Owner direction this turn: "final push, let's get the plan tidy up plan fully delivered". My read: drain remaining cycles 9-11 + 15 to LANDED, leaving plan terminal.
